Operations for the Gemini and Apollo

Pilot, White as Senior Pilot, and rookie

his shoulder twice aboard the KC135
weightlessness training aircraft, and had to
replaced him with Chaffee. NASA announced
the final crew selection for AS-204 on
consisting of Gemini veterans James McDivitt
and David Scott, with rookie Russell L. "Rusty"
Schirra, Eisele, and rookie Walter Cunningham
